SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.safety.settleout

Class SettleOutPressureResult

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.settleout.SettleOutPressureResult
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class SettleOutPressureResult extends Object implements Serializable
Result of a SettleOutPressureAnalyzer settle-out (gas-volume equalisation) screening.

Summarises the common settle-out pressure reached after a compressor trip, the settle-out temperature and compressibility used, the total inventory and volume, the margin to the protected (low-pressure) system rating, the verdict, and the per-compartment inventory breakdown.

Version:
1.0
Author:
ESOL
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • SettleOutPressureResult

      public SettleOutPressureResult(double settleOutPressureBara, double settleOutTemperatureK, double settleOutZFactor, double totalMoles, double totalVolumeM3, double maxCompartmentPressureBara, double minCompartmentPressureBara, double protectedRatingBara, boolean ratingProvided, double marginToRatingBar, boolean exceedsRating, SettleOutPressureAnalyzer.SettleOutVerdict verdict, List<SettleOutPressureResult.CompartmentResult> compartments, List<String> warnings)
      Construct a settle-out pressure result.
      Parameters:
      settleOutPressureBara - common settle-out pressure in bara
      settleOutTemperatureK - settle-out temperature in K
      settleOutZFactor - compressibility factor at the settle-out condition
      totalMoles - total conserved inventory in mol
      totalVolumeM3 - combined connected volume in m3
      maxCompartmentPressureBara - highest initial compartment pressure in bara
      minCompartmentPressureBara - lowest initial compartment pressure in bara
      protectedRatingBara - protected-system design / relief set pressure in bara
      ratingProvided - true if the protected-system rating was supplied
      marginToRatingBar - protected rating minus settle-out pressure in bar; NaN when no rating supplied
      exceedsRating - true if the settle-out pressure exceeds the protected rating
      verdict - the screening verdict
      compartments - per-compartment inventory breakdown
      warnings - list of warnings; never null

  • Method Details

    • getSettleOutPressureBara

      public double getSettleOutPressureBara()
      Gets the common settle-out pressure.

      Gets the lowest initial compartment pressure.

      minimum compartment pressure in bara

    • getProtectedRatingBara

      public double getProtectedRatingBara()
      Gets the protected-system design / relief set pressure.
      Returns:
      protected-system rating in bara

    • isRatingProvided

      public boolean isRatingProvided()
      Indicates whether a protected-system rating was supplied.
      Returns:
      true if a rating was supplied

    • getMarginToRatingBar

      public double getMarginToRatingBar()
      Gets the margin between the protected rating and the settle-out pressure.
      Returns:
      margin in bar; negative when the rating is exceeded, NaN when no rating supplied

    • isExceedsRating

      public boolean isExceedsRating()
      Indicates whether the settle-out pressure exceeds the protected rating.
      Returns:
      true if the rating is exceeded

    • getVerdict

      public SettleOutPressureAnalyzer.SettleOutVerdict getVerdict()
      Gets the screening verdict.
      Returns:
      the settle-out verdict

      Gets the per-compartment inventory breakdown.
      Returns:
      list of compartment results

      Gets the warnings raised during the screening.
      Returns:
      list of warnings; never null
